title: What Islam Says Happens 6 Seconds After You Die

sound.ambient: deep dark ambience, hollow cavernous air, distant low rumble, cold and still, faint cosmic wind, no music, no melody, no instruments

_note: Afterlife Journey, Part 1. All AI narration (no recitation) = copyright-free. Hand-built illustrated scenes per beat (aniconic).

segments.text: This is what Islam says happens in the first moments after you die… and most people have never heard it.
segments.caption: The first moments after death.

segments.text: The instant your soul leaves your body, the Prophet, peace be upon him, said angels carry it upward, past sky after sky, until it stands before Allah.
segments.caption: Musnad Ahmad; Abu Dawud

segments.text: Then it is returned to the earth. Because the body in the grave is not asleep… it is about to be questioned.
segments.caption: The questioning of the grave.

segments.sfx: deep low ominous impact, single hollow boom, dark
segments.text: Two figures arrive in the dark. They sit you up. And they ask three questions. Who is your Lord? What is your religion? And who… was this man sent to you?
segments.caption: Sahih al-Bukhari; Abu Dawud

segments.text: For some, the answers come like light, and the grave opens wide. For others… there is only silence.
segments.caption: Sahih al-Bukhari

segments.text: And this is only the beginning. The grave is just the first stage of a journey every soul will take.
segments.caption: The first stage of the journey.

segments.text: Follow for Part Two… what the angels do next.
segments.caption: Follow for Part 2.

sources: Musnad Ahmad; Sunan Abi Dawud - the soul's ascent (hadith of al-Bara ibn Azib)
Sahih al-Bukhari; Sunan Abi Dawud - the questioning of the grave
Jami at-Tirmidhi - the two angels (Munkar and Nakir)
